mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_notification (user_id, title, content, type, priority, is_read, is_deleted, create_time, sender_id, scheduled_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.type}, #{item.priority}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.scheduledTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, type, priority, is_read, is_deleted, create_time, read_time, sender_id, scheduled_time FROM tb_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, title, content, type, priority, is_read, is_deleted, create_time, read_time, sender_id, scheduled_time FROM tb_notification ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM tb_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY type
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN is_read = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as readCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unreadCount FROM tb_notification WHERE sender_id = #{senderId}
